bead.title: Harden Docker image release workflow and smoke test
bead.description: Harden Docker release behavior from docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: .github/workflows/docker-image.yml publishes a GHCR image for v* tags and manual dispatch, but does not publish the normalized semver tag set, smoke-test Kafka usability, or document digest/provenance. In-scope files: .github/workflows/docker-image.yml, Dockerfile if needed, scripts/* if a smoke helper is added, docs/release/* if needed. Out of scope: GitHub binary release, Helm chart publishing, microsite content.
bead.acceptance:
1. `.github/workflows/docker-image.yml` publishes tags `vX.Y.Z`, `X.Y.Z`, `X.Y`, `X`, and `latest` only for stable release tags.
2. `grep -q "ghcr.io/easel/heimq" .github/workflows/docker-image.yml README.md charts/heimq/values.yaml` passes after this bead or a documented dynamic equivalent is used in workflow code.
3. The Docker workflow includes a built-image smoke test that verifies Kafka metadata or produce/fetch behavior, not just TCP readiness.
4. `docker build -t heimq:local .` passes.
5. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
